content: I publish my research for book projects and anything that sparks my interest. I’m no longer actively involved in the business; I invest and have strong opinions. I’m married with four children, soon to be seven grandchildren. I wish for a solution-oriented world, but it currently seems to be more in a rollback or retro state.

title: About me
